---
title: "owner-analysis"
author: "Esha Prasad"
date: "4-16-26"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

## Loading the Data

```{r}
lobster_abundance <- read_csv(here::here("data/Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20220829.csv"))
```
